passive.name: Gathering Fire
passive.description: Karma's damaging abilities will reduce the cooldown of Mantra.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} ''{{ais|Mantra|Karma}}'' current cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reduced}} by a few seconds for each enemy champion hit by {{cis|Karma}} damaging [[Champion ability|abilities]].
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} ''{{ais|Mantra|Karma}}'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced by 4 seconds for each enemy champion hit by '''Karma's''' damaging [[Champion ability|abilities]].
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{ai|Inner Flame|Karma}} / {{ai|Soulflare|Karma}} reduces {{ais|Mantra|Karma}} cooldown per champion hit by either damage instance (up to a maximum total reduction of {{ap|4*10}} seconds if 5 enemy champions are hit by both instances of damage).
* {{ai|Focused Resolve|Karma}} / {{ai|Renewal|Karma}} reduces {{ais|Mantra|Karma}} cooldown when initially cast and again after the duration for the tether has expired (for a total reduction of {{ap|4*2}} seconds).

Q.name: Inner Flame
Q.description:
Karma sends forth a ball of spirit energy that explodes and deals damage upon hitting an enemy unit.

Mantra Bonus: In addition to the explosion, Mantra increases the destructive power of her Inner Flame, creating a cataclysm which deals damage after a short delay.
Q.tooltip: Karma fires a blast of energy, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to the first target hit and surrounding enemies, and Slowing them by {{ slowamount*-100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Karma}} fires a bolt in the target direction that explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}} them.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Karma''' fires a bolt in the target direction that explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 40% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.

W.name: Focused Resolve
W.description:
Karma creates a tether between herself and a targeted enemy, dealing damage and revealing them. If the tether is not broken, the enemy will be rooted and damaged again.

Mantra Bonus: Karma strengthens the link, healing herself and extending the root duration.
W.tooltip: Karma tethers herself to a champion or jungle monster, dealing {{ initialdamage }} magic damage and revealing them for {{ tetherduration }}s. If the tether remains unbroken, the target takes {{ initialdamage }} magic damage again and is Rooted for {{ rootduration }}s.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Karma}} deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|tether|tethers}} to the target enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the tether is not broken after a short time, the target is dealt {{as|magic damage}}, briefly {{tip|root|rooted}}, and {{tip|true sight|revealed}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Karma''' deals {{as|magic damage}} to the target enemy {{tip|champion}} or {{tip|monster}} and forms a {{tip|tether}} between her and them for 2 seconds, during which they are {{tip|true sight|revealed}}.
wiki_detail.description2: If the tether is not broken by the end of its duration, the target is dealt the same {{as|magic damage}} again and is {{tip|root|rooted}} for a duration, during which they are {{tip|true sight|revealed}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|40*2 to 140*2}} {{as|(+ 90% AP)}}}}
{{st|Root Duration|{{ap|1.6 to 2}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the tether's application and damage but not the aftereffects of one already applied.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

E.name: Inspire
E.description:
Karma summons a protective shield that absorbs incoming damage and increases the Move Speed of the protected ally.

Mantra Bonus: Energy radiates out from her target, strengthening the initial shield and applying Inspire to nearby allied champions.
E.tooltip: Karma grants an allied champion {{ totalshield }} Shield for {{ shieldduration }}s and {{ movespeed*100 }}% Move Speed for {{ movespeedduration }}s.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Karma}} applies a {{tip|shield}} on herself or the target allied champion for a short time, which briefly grants {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Karma''' grants a {{tip|shield}} to herself or the target allied champion for {{fd|2.5}} seconds as well as {{sti|ms|{{as|40% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for 2 seconds.

R.name: Mantra
R.description: Karma empowers her next ability to do an additional effect. Mantra is available at level 1 and does not require a skill point.
R.tooltip:
Karma empowers her next Ability used within 8 seconds.
Inner Flame: Deals an additional {{ rqimpactdamage }} magic damage and leaves behind a circle of flame, Slowing enemies and dealing an additional {{ rqfielddamage }} magic damage.Focused Resolve: Karma will restore {{ rwhealamount }} missing Health at the beginning and end of the tether, and Root for {{ rwbonusroot }}s longer.Inspire: Karma shields her target for {{ rebonusshield }} more Shield, and also shields allies near her target, granting them {{ rebonusshieldarea }} Shield and {{ removespeed*100 }}% Move Speed.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Karma}} empowers her next ability within a period to apply an additional effect.
wiki_detail.blurb4: '''Karma''' begins the game with one rank in ''Mantra''. Her empowered abilities scale based on ''Mantra's'' rank.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Karma''' empowers her next basic ability within 8 seconds for an additional effect.

''Mantra can be used while affected by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}.''
wiki_detail.description2: '''Karma''' begins the game with one rank in ''Mantra''. Her empowered abilities scale based on ''Mantra's'' rank.
